label: OpenSimplex2S 噪声
description: 基于 FastNoiseLite 的 OpenSimplex2S 噪声生成器，OpenSimplex2 的平滑变体，质量更高但计算略慢，支持分形叠加
description-en: OpenSimplex2S noise generator based on FastNoiseLite, a smoother variant of OpenSimplex2 with higher quality, supporting fractal types.
icon: 平滑渐变的有机纹理，圆润的等值线区域层层包裹，比普通噪声更丝滑流畅的过渡效果，简洁扁平风格

inputs.name: frequency
inputs.label: 频率
inputs.description: 噪声采样频率，值越大细节越密集
inputs.description-en: Noise sampling frequency; higher values produce denser detail.

inputs.name: fractalType
inputs.label: 分形类型
inputs.description: 分形叠加方式：None=单层, FBm=分形布朗运动, Ridged=脊状, PingPong=乒乓
inputs.description-en: Fractal type: None, FBm, Ridged, or PingPong.

inputs.name: octaves
inputs.label: 八度数
inputs.description: 分形叠加层数，层数越多细节越丰富
inputs.description-en: Number of fractal octaves; more octaves add finer detail.

inputs.name: lacunarity
inputs.label: 间隙度
inputs.description: 每层八度的频率倍增系数

inputs.name: gain
inputs.label: 增益
inputs.description: 每层八度的振幅衰减系数

inputs.name: offsetX
inputs.label: X偏移
inputs.description: 噪声采样的X偏移量，用于平移噪声图案
inputs.description-en: X offset for noise sampling, used to pan the noise pattern.

inputs.name: offsetY
inputs.label: Y偏移
inputs.description: 噪声采样的Y偏移量，用于平移噪声图案
inputs.description-en: Y offset for noise sampling, used to pan the noise pattern.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，不同种子产生不同的噪声图案
inputs.description-en: Random seed; different seeds produce different noise patterns.

outputs.name: grid
outputs.label: 噪声网格
outputs.description: 输出网格，单层值域约 0~1（连续浮点值）；启用 FBm/Ridged/PingPong 分形时极值可能略超出该区间。渲染器自动识别为连续值网格，使用单色 + 透明度渐变显示
outputs.description-en: Output grid; single-octave values are in ~[0,1] (continuous floats). Fractal modes (FBm/Ridged/PingPong) may slightly exceed this range. Renderer auto-detects as continuous grid.
